title.zh: 嵌入式软件工程师｜C / Linux / 设备通信
title.en: Embedded Software Engineer · C / Linux / Device Connectivity

summary.zh: 3 年以上嵌入式与物联网研发经验，主攻 C、Linux、MCU/RTOS 与设备通信。具备从 Cat.1 模组和 MCU 网络栈调试，到多协议 4G 网关、跨端设备 APP、集中控制平台及现场交付的端到端实践；擅长将复杂协议与异常场景收敛为可维护链路，并通过日志、抓包和硬件调试完成稳定性闭环。
summary.en: Embedded and IoT engineer with 3+ years of experience focused on C, Linux, MCU/RTOS, and device connectivity. End-to-end experience spans Cat.1 and MCU network-stack debugging, multi-protocol 4G gateways, cross-platform device apps, centralized control platforms, and field delivery. Strong at turning complex protocols and failure modes into maintainable paths, then closing reliability issues through logs, packet analysis, and hardware debugging.

availability.zh: 寻求嵌入式软件、设备通信与物联网方向机会
availability.en: Seeking embedded software, device connectivity, and IoT opportunities

title.zh: 从底层让设备稳定运行
title.en: Make devices reliable from the foundation

body.zh: 围绕 C、FreeRTOS、RT-Thread、LWIP、USART 与 DMA，完成设备侧开发、调试与通信验证。
body.en: Build, debug, and validate device-side connectivity with C, FreeRTOS, RT-Thread, LWIP, USART, and DMA.

title.zh: 把多协议收敛为可维护链路
title.en: Turn multiple protocols into maintainable paths

body.zh: 在 TCP、UDP、MQTT、RS485、USB、BLE 与 SPP 之间完成协议设计、适配、联调与问题定位。
body.en: Design, adapt, integrate, and diagnose flows across TCP, UDP, MQTT, RS485, USB, BLE, and SPP.

title.zh: 把设备能力交给真实用户
title.en: Put device capabilities in users’ hands

body.zh: 通过 Flutter、Android 原生与设备通信桥接，支撑 Android、iOS 与 HarmonyOS 端交付。
body.en: Use Flutter, native Android, and device bridges to support Android, iOS, and HarmonyOS delivery.

title.zh: 把现场方案沉淀为可运营系统
title.en: Turn field solutions into operable systems

body.zh: 通过 Go、Vue 3、数据存储与部署文档，将设备能力沉淀为可维护、可持续迭代的平台。
body.en: Use Go, Vue 3, data storage, and deployment documentation to turn device capabilities into maintainable platforms.

title.zh: 嵌入式开发与实时系统
通信与协议
应用与平台工程
调试、测试与交付

company.zh: 北京软石智控科技有限公司

role.zh: 嵌入式软件开发工程师

summary.zh: 围绕嵌入式控制器、4G 网关、设备管理 APP 与集中控制平台持续研发，职责从底层通信和设备联调扩展到系统设计、跨端发布、环境部署与长期运维，覆盖需求澄清、开发验证、现场交付和版本迭代。
summary.en: Develop embedded controllers, 4G gateways, device-management apps, and centralized control platforms. Responsibilities have grown from low-level connectivity and device integration into system design, cross-platform releases, environment deployment, and long-term operations across requirements, implementation, field delivery, and release iteration.

bullets.zh:
- 负责 Cat.1 模组、HC32 MCU 与嵌入式 Linux 网关开发调试，覆盖 RTOS / LWIP、USART / DMA、FOTA、网络接入和多任务问题定位。
- 设计并维护 MQTT、TCP/UDP、RS485、USB、BLE/SPP 等通信链路，承载设备接入、指令/状态、文件传输、定时与远控，并持续治理重连、粘包、断点续传、内存泄漏和长期运行异常。
- 参与 4G 网关、Flutter APP 与集中控制平台核心功能建设，贯通设备适配、本地控制、云端管理和状态回传的端到端流程。
- 完成 Android、iOS、HarmonyOS 适配发布及多个项目环境部署升级，承担现场问题闭环、培训支持和中英文协议/说明书沉淀。
bullets.en:
- Developed and debugged Cat.1 modules, HC32 MCU software, and embedded Linux gateways across RTOS/LWIP, USART/DMA, FOTA, network access, and multitasking diagnosis.
- Designed and maintained MQTT, TCP/UDP, RS485, USB, and BLE/SPP paths for device onboarding, commands, telemetry, files, schedules, and remote control, continually addressing reconnects, framing, resumable transfers, memory leaks, and long-running faults.
- Built core capabilities across 4G gateways, Flutter apps, and centralized platforms, connecting device adapters, local control, cloud management, and telemetry into end-to-end workflows.
- Delivered Android, iOS, and HarmonyOS adaptations plus multiple environment deployments and upgrades, field issue closure, training support, and bilingual protocol/manual documentation.

title.zh: 4G 单灯控制器与云端管控平台

summary.zh: 面向分布式照明设备的端云一体化系统，覆盖 4G 接入、分级控制、状态监测、地图分组、节目下发与运行追踪。
summary.en: A device-to-cloud system for distributed lighting devices, covering 4G onboarding, scoped control, telemetry, map-based grouping, program delivery, and operational traceability.

role.zh: 设备通信与物联网平台工程师

background.zh: 分布式单灯设备需要通过不稳定的移动网络统一接入云端，在单设备、分组与广播控制之间保持一致语义，并让激活、定位、遥测和文件任务具备可追踪的运行闭环。
background.en: Distributed lamp controllers need consistent cloud control over variable mobile networks, with the same semantics across individual, group, and broadcast scopes and traceable lifecycle states for onboarding, location, telemetry, and file tasks.

actions.zh:
- 参与技术选型与端云架构设计，以控制器模拟器先行验证注册、主题分配、心跳/状态、指令和文件任务等协议状态。
- 参与设备侧单灯发现、参数配置、消息交互与定位授时功能，完善文件完整性校验、替换及异常回退。
- 开发项目、网关、设备、分组、地图、消息主题、测试指令、文件与操作日志等结构化管理能力。
- 推进服务器侧网关服务，已基本打通设备/分组列表、状态读取以及单设备、分组和广播范围的核心控制。
- 设计异步文件下发：消息链路承载任务、进度与结果，HTTP/HTTPS 承载文件传输，并参与容器化环境的部署与运行验证。
actions.en:
- Contributed to device-to-cloud architecture and used a controller simulator first to validate protocol states for registration, topic assignment, heartbeat/telemetry, commands, and file tasks.
- Contributed device-side lamp discovery, parameter configuration, messaging, and location/time features, adding file-integrity checks, replacement, and failure rollback.
- Built structured management for projects, gateways, devices, groups, maps, messaging topics, test commands, files, and operational logs.
- Advanced the server-side gateway service to a working core path for device/group lists, state reads, and control scoped to individual devices, groups, or broadcasts.
- Designed asynchronous file delivery where messaging carries task state, progress, and results while HTTP/HTTPS carries content, and supported containerized deployment and runtime validation.

results.zh:
- 已贯通“设备注册 → 主题分配 → 控制下发 → 状态回传 → 文件下载”的主体流程，并完成单设备与多设备文件任务验证。
- 设备侧固件、控制器模拟器、管理后台与服务器侧网关已具备核心联调条件；界面交互与稳定性仍按版本推进。
- 建立覆盖通信、定位、电气参数、显示状态、节目任务和网络质量的统一状态模型与操作追踪。
results.en:
- Connected the main flow from device registration and topic assignment through commands, telemetry, and file download, including single- and multi-device file-task validation.
- Brought the device firmware, controller simulator, management backend, and server-side gateway to a core integration-ready stage; UI and reliability work continue by release.
- Established a unified, traceable state model spanning connectivity, location, electrical readings, display state, program tasks, and network quality.

title.zh: 物联网集中控制平台

summary.zh: 连接 Linux 网关、现场设备与运营端的集中控制平台，统一承载设备接入、场景编排、能耗分析和媒体任务。
summary.en: A centralized control platform connecting Linux gateways, field devices, and operators through unified onboarding, scene orchestration, energy analytics, and media workflows.

role.zh: 设备与平台软件工程师

background.zh: 网关、强弱电回路、节目和场景原本分散在不同控制路径中，需要形成统一设备模型、可编排业务流程和可持续部署运维的平台。
background.en: Gateways, power circuits, media, and scenes were split across separate control paths and needed a unified device model, orchestrated workflows, and maintainable deployment and operations.

actions.zh:
- 参与 Vue 3 前端、Go 接口和设备控制开发，将网关发现、批量回路控制、权限、节目与场景编排收敛到统一操作流程。
- 建设节目上传、文件下载、视频切割与临时播放链路，围绕任务状态和异常日志定位文件缺失、处理失败及设备播放问题。
- 开发网关状态、开关控制、心跳与能耗接口，支持按小时、日期和分时维度查询展示用电数据。
- 负责测试及项目环境部署升级，通过日志、数据库和网络排查设备掉线、存储空间、服务配置与新设备接入问题。
- 沉淀 API、部署手册和中英文操作文档，配合交付支持、培训与需求迭代。
actions.en:
- Contributed Vue 3 frontend, Go APIs, and device control, consolidating gateway discovery, batch circuit control, permissions, media, and scene orchestration into consistent operator workflows.
- Built media upload, file download, video slicing, and temporary playback paths, using task state and operational logs to diagnose missing files, processing failures, and device playback issues.
- Implemented gateway status, switch control, heartbeat, and energy APIs with hourly, daily, and time-of-use views.
- Deployed and upgraded test and project environments, diagnosing device-offline, storage, service-configuration, and new-device onboarding issues through logs, databases, and network checks.
- Maintained APIs, deployment guides, and bilingual operating manuals while supporting delivery, training, and requirements iteration.

results.zh:
- 持续交付场景编排、能耗统计、回路管理、多设备控制和媒体任务等核心能力。
- 支持多个项目环境完成部署、升级与问题闭环，并形成可复用的部署和操作资料。
- 完成中英文场景能力与界面主题升级，补充媒体缩略图和分辨率处理等运营功能。
results.en:
- Continually delivered core capabilities for scene orchestration, energy analytics, circuit management, multi-device control, and media tasks.
- Supported deployment, upgrades, and issue closure across multiple project environments with reusable deployment and operating documentation.
- Added bilingual scene workflows and a visual refresh, plus operational features such as media thumbnails and resolution handling.

title.zh: 跨端 4G 设备管理 APP

summary.zh: 统一远程 4G、本地 USB 与近场蓝牙三类链路的跨端设备管理 APP，覆盖控制、文件传输、升级与异常恢复。
summary.en: A cross-platform device-management app that unifies remote 4G, local USB, and nearby Bluetooth paths for control, file transfer, upgrades, and failure recovery.

background.zh: 同一设备需要在远程、本地有线和近场无线场景中保持一致操作体验，同时处理不同系统权限、原生库边界和连接生命周期差异。
background.en: The same device needed a consistent operator experience across remote, local wired, and nearby wireless scenarios despite platform permission, native-library, and connection-lifecycle differences.

actions.zh:
- 接手 Flutter 工程及 Android/iOS 构建链路，通过 FFI 与平台原生能力适配 SDK、动态库和静态库，持续维护可发布版本。
- 将远程控制、USB 脱机、SPP/BLE 的通道差异收敛到一致业务流程，开发上传下载、断点续传、一键上传和设备升级。
- 围绕连接与传输状态治理 USB 反复插拔、中断重连、线程阻塞、凭据过期、页面卡顿和触摸冲突等问题。
- 完成中英文、多服务地址与系统差异适配，覆盖 Android、iOS、HarmonyOS 的权限、深色模式和发布要求。
actions.en:
- Took over the Flutter project and Android/iOS build paths, using FFI and platform-native integration to adapt SDKs, dynamic libraries, and static libraries into maintainable releases.
- Normalized remote control, USB offline, and SPP/BLE transport differences into consistent workflows for upload/download, resumable transfer, one-click upload, and device upgrades.
- Stabilized connection and transfer state across repeated USB hot-plug, interrupted reconnects, thread blocking, credential expiry, page stalls, and touch conflicts.
- Delivered bilingual UI, multiple service endpoints, and Android, iOS, and HarmonyOS adaptation for permissions, dark mode, and release requirements.

results.zh:
- 完成 Android、iOS、HarmonyOS 三端适配，并参与 Android 厂商应用商店、Apple App Store 与鸿蒙应用市场发布。
- 已形成远程与 USB 脱机控制、文件传输、设备升级和异常恢复主流程；Android SPP 基本完成，iOS BLE 脱机能力仍按版本推进。
results.en:
- Completed Android, iOS, and HarmonyOS adaptation and contributed releases to Android vendor stores, Apple App Store, and the HarmonyOS app marketplace.
- Established the main remote and USB-offline workflows for file transfer, upgrades, and recovery; Android SPP was substantially complete while iOS BLE offline capability continued by release.

title.zh: 嵌入式 4G 网关

summary.zh: 连接云端平台、强弱电设备与现场网络的多协议 Linux 边缘网关，承担协议适配、本地编排、数据持久化和升级恢复。
summary.en: A multi-protocol Linux edge gateway connecting cloud platforms, power-control devices, and field networks through protocol adaptation, local orchestration, persistence, and upgrade recovery.

background.zh: 现场硬件需要演进为可长期运行的边缘节点，在多通信通道、离线数据、定时联动和远程运维之间建立统一的软件边界。
background.en: Field hardware needed to evolve into a long-running edge node with clear software boundaries across multiple transports, offline data, scheduled orchestration, and remote operations.

actions.zh:
- 参与需求、架构与协议设计，按网络通信、设备适配、本地数据和业务调度拆分职责，实现 MQTT、UDP、RS485、强电控制与数据采集。
- 开发 U 盘/远程升级、进度上报、GPS 授时与定位、配置持久化、操作日志及错误升级防护。
- 设计多场景、多时间轴和多事件联动，让 RS485、UDP、MQTT 与强电动作按统一计划执行。
- 增加电表数据采集上报、主从网关转发、平台接口和远程控制适配，支撑现场协议接入。
- 通过心跳、重连、日志与长期运行测试定位时区/节日定时、内存泄漏、通信失效、RS485 丢包和异常重启。
actions.en:
- Contributed requirements, architecture, and protocol design, separating network communication, device adaptation, local data, and business scheduling while implementing MQTT, UDP, RS485, power control, and acquisition.
- Built USB/remote upgrades, progress reporting, GPS time and location, persistent configuration, operational logs, and safeguards against invalid upgrades.
- Designed multi-scene, multi-timeline orchestration so RS485, UDP, MQTT, and power actions execute against one schedule.
- Added meter acquisition and reporting, primary-secondary gateway forwarding, platform APIs, and remote-control adaptation for field protocol integration.
- Used heartbeats, reconnects, logs, and long-running tests to diagnose timezone/holiday schedules, memory leaks, communication loss, RS485 packet loss, and abnormal restarts.

results.zh:
- 完成网关核心链路开发测试，形成从多协议接入、本地持久化、场景调度、能耗上报到升级恢复的完整能力，并持续接入集中控制平台与远程 APP。
- 支持现场网关协议与强电模块适配，完成部署问题定位和长期版本迭代。
results.en:
- Delivered and tested the gateway core path spanning multi-protocol access, local persistence, scene scheduling, energy reporting, and upgrade recovery, with continued integration into the centralized platform and remote app.
- Supported field gateway protocols and power-module adaptation through deployment diagnosis and long-term release iteration.

title.zh: Air780E / HC32 通信与 RTOS 调试

summary.zh: 围绕 Cat.1 联网与 MCU 协同，完成网络能力、串口数据通道、网络栈、FOTA 和 RTOS 调试验证。
summary.en: Validated Cat.1 connectivity and MCU collaboration across networking, serial data paths, the network stack, FOTA, and RTOS debugging.

background.zh: 项目需要验证 Cat.1 模组的网络与升级能力，并在 HC32 侧完成串口、DMA、网络栈和多任务协同，解决跨芯片数据分层与调试阻塞。
background.en: The project needed to validate Cat.1 networking and upgrades while coordinating serial I/O, DMA, the network stack, and multitasking on HC32 and resolving cross-chip data-layer and debugging blockers.

actions.zh:
- 验证 Air780E 的 TCP/UDP、HTTP/HTTPS、DNS、硬件流控与上下行传输，并协同模块和网络服务支持定位链路问题。
- 设计 Air780E 与 HC32 的串口消息边界，在 HC32 侧整合 FreeRTOS、RT-Thread、LWIP、USART 与 DMA，完成 IP/TCP 数据的合成、解析和转发验证。
- 完成 4G 模组 FOTA、电流与内存布局测试，并使用 J-Link、GDB、OpenOCD、Ozone、SysView 分析中断、任务切换与调试异常。
actions.en:
- Validated Air780E TCP/UDP, HTTP/HTTPS, DNS, hardware flow control, and uplink/downlink behavior while coordinating module and network-service support on connectivity issues.
- Defined the Air780E-HC32 serial message boundary and integrated FreeRTOS, RT-Thread, LWIP, USART, and DMA on HC32 to validate assembly, parsing, and forwarding of IP/TCP data.
- Completed FOTA, current, and memory-layout tests and used J-Link, GDB, OpenOCD, Ozone, and SysView to diagnose interrupts, task switches, and debugger failures.

results.zh:
- 使 4G 链路达到测试使用要求，完成 RAW API TCP 通信、FOTA 流程与多块样机验证。
- 建立模组与 MCU 间的数据交互链路，并解决 J-Link 调试阻塞问题，沉淀开发与调试文档。
results.en:
- Brought the 4G path to the required test level and completed RAW API TCP, FOTA, and multi-board validation.
- Established module-to-MCU data exchange, resolved the J-Link debugging blocker, and documented development and debugging workflows.

title.zh: 上位机与音视频工具

summary.zh: 面向工程文件处理与多媒体播放的上位机工具集，覆盖 DXF 运算、音视频同步、实时帧输出和跨平台集成。
summary.en: Desktop tooling for engineering-file processing and media playback, spanning DXF computation, A/V synchronization, real-time frame output, and cross-platform integration.

background.zh: 既有工具需要在大规模图形处理、音画同步、按帧控制和 Windows/Linux 集成方面提升性能、稳定性与复用性。
background.en: Existing tools needed better performance, reliability, and reuse across large-scale geometry processing, A/V synchronization, frame-level control, and Windows/Linux integration.

actions.zh:
- 使用 C# 解析 ELF 符号与来源映射，并验证基于 OpenOCD 的下载调试工具链。
- 基于 FFmpeg/SDL 实现音频输出、音画同步、指定帧定位与播放，将播放器核心封装为 Windows DLL，并完成嵌入式 Linux 适配。
- 使用 VB6 与 Python 处理 DXF 线段分割，通过算法与内存优化提升大规模布线处理效率，并修复图像旋转和资源释放问题。
actions.en:
- Parsed ELF symbols and source mappings in C# and validated an OpenOCD-backed download and debugging toolchain.
- Implemented audio output, A/V sync, frame seeking, and playback with FFmpeg/SDL, packaged the player core as a Windows DLL, and adapted it to embedded Linux.
- Built DXF line segmentation with VB6 and Python, improving large-layout throughput through algorithm and memory work while fixing image rotation and resource-release issues.

results.zh:
- 完成 Windows 播放 DLL 与 VB6 上位机集成，支持音频输出、音画同步和指定位置跳转，并解决重复启停、连续播放、关键帧偏差与播放闪退。
- 完成嵌入式 Linux 播放适配；DXF 与图像工具经多轮性能和稳定性优化，可支撑实际工程文件处理。
results.en:
- Integrated a Windows playback DLL into the VB6 desktop application with audio output, A/V sync, and seeking, resolving repeated start/stop, continuous-playback, keyframe-offset, and crash issues.
- Completed embedded Linux playback adaptation and iteratively improved DXF and image tooling for production engineering files.

title.zh: 产品文档与 Dify 知识库

summary.zh: 将分散的产品说明书、技术资料与常见问题整理为在线/离线文档平台，并扩展为可在移动端调用的智能问答入口。
summary.en: Consolidated product manuals, technical references, and FAQs into online/offline documentation, then extended them into an intelligent Q&A entry available from the mobile app.

role.zh: 资料平台与知识库工程师

background.zh: 客户、销售与售后需要更快定位产品资料，减少重复答疑。
background.en: Customers, sales, and support teams needed faster access to product knowledge with less repeated manual assistance.

actions.zh:
- 重构产品说明书结构与内容规范，建设在线/离线资料平台，并补充文件下载与视频播放。
- 验证本地大模型与 API 调用，评估云端方案，基于 Dify 建设产品资料检索与问答链路。
- 优化文档解析与知识入库效果，并将知识库 API 接入 Flutter APP，形成移动端使用入口。
actions.en:
- Reworked manual structure and content standards, built online/offline documentation, and added file download and video playback.
- Validated local language-model deployment and APIs, evaluated cloud options, and built product-document retrieval and Q&A with Dify.
- Improved document ingestion and knowledge-base quality and integrated the API into the Flutter app as a mobile entry point.

results.zh:
- 形成“规范化说明书 → 在线资料 → 智能检索问答 → 移动端调用”的知识服务链路。
- 为客户、销售与售后提供统一资料入口，降低重复查找与答疑成本。
results.en:
- Established a knowledge-service flow from standardized manuals to online documentation, intelligent retrieval/Q&A, and mobile access.
- Provided customers, sales, and support with one knowledge entry, reducing repeated searching and manual responses.

title.zh: Android 与嵌入式设备通信

summary.zh: 构建 Android 原生通信底座，连接移动端、Linux 设备与中继服务，覆盖 USB、BLE、SPP 与 TCP 多通道。
summary.en: Built a native Android connectivity foundation linking mobile clients, Linux devices, and relay services across USB, BLE, SPP, and TCP.

role.zh: Android 应用与设备通信工程师

background.zh: 设备需要同时覆盖本地有线、近场无线与 TCP 中继控制，并在脱机控制、文件传输和异常恢复场景中保持通信稳定。
background.en: The device needed local wired, nearby wireless, and TCP-relayed control with reliable communication across offline control, file transfer, and failure recovery.

actions.zh:
- 使用 Java 开发 USB CDC、BLE 与 SPP 通信，处理设备识别、权限、插拔和连接生命周期，并实现 Android 端 TCP 中继。
- 将既有通信能力封装为 Android 原生库，配合 Linux 端转发服务打通设备、APP 与中继链路。
- 处理大文件传输粘包、USB 反复插拔、断线重连、锁屏、心跳和异常中断等稳定性问题。
actions.en:
- Built USB CDC, BLE, and SPP communication in Java, handling device discovery, permissions, hot-plug, and connection lifecycles alongside an Android-side TCP relay.
- Packaged existing connectivity into an Android native library and connected it with a Linux forwarding service across device, app, and relay layers.
- Stabilized large-file framing, repeated USB hot-plug, reconnects, lock-screen behavior, heartbeats, and interrupted transfers.

results.zh:
- 完成 Android APP、Linux 设备与中继服务之间的多通道数据交互。
- 解决大文件、插拔、心跳和异常恢复等关键问题，并作为后续 Flutter 跨端重构的业务与通信基线。
results.en:
- Delivered multi-channel data exchange across the Android app, Linux devices, and relay services.
- Resolved key large-file, hot-plug, heartbeat, and recovery issues, establishing the business and connectivity baseline for the later Flutter cross-platform rebuild.

title.zh: QEMU 虚拟平台

summary.zh: 在 Windows 主机上搭建 Cortex-A9 Linux 与 Cortex-M4 FreeRTOS 的可复现启动、图形和调试环境。
summary.en: Reproducible Cortex-A9 Linux and Cortex-M4 FreeRTOS startup, graphics, and debugging environments hosted on Windows.

background.zh: 需要在 Windows 环境中验证 ARM Linux 与 Cortex-M FreeRTOS 的启动、图形和调试能力。
background.en: ARM Linux and Cortex-M FreeRTOS startup, graphics, and debugging capabilities needed validation in a Windows-hosted environment.

actions.zh:
- 搭建 Cortex-A9 Linux 虚拟平台，完成内核、设备树、BusyBox 根文件系统、U-Boot、网络与 SSH 配置。
- 搭建 Cortex-M4 + FreeRTOS 环境，验证任务启动与 Framebuffer 图形输出。
- 配置 GDB 远程调试入口，沉淀构建脚本、启动参数和问题定位文档。
actions.en:
- Built a Cortex-A9 Linux platform with the kernel, device tree, BusyBox root filesystem, U-Boot, networking, and SSH configuration.
- Created a Cortex-M4 + FreeRTOS environment and validated task startup and framebuffer output.
- Configured a remote GDB entry point and documented build scripts, startup parameters, and diagnosis steps.

results.zh: 完成两类处理器虚拟平台的构建与运行验证，形成可复用运行包和文档，为无实体硬件时的功能验证提供环境。
results.en: Completed build and runtime validation for two processor families, producing reusable run packages and documentation for validation without physical hardware.

title.zh: LoRa 物联网智慧牧场

summary.zh: LoRa 自组织网络、Android APP 与 C# 上位机组成的环境监测与控制系统。
summary.en: Environmental monitoring and control built with a LoRa mesh, Android app, and C# desktop client.

background.zh: 项目面向智慧养殖场的环境监测与自动控制，通过 LoRa 自组织网络连接节点与网关，并由移动端和上位机完成集中管理。
background.en: The project targeted environmental monitoring and automated control for smart farming, connecting nodes and gateways through a LoRa mesh with mobile and desktop management.

actions.zh:
- 使用 Android Studio + Java 开发移动端状态显示与控制。
- 使用 .NET / C# 开发数据采集、存储、分析和设备控制上位机。
- 参与 LoRa 通信流程、Python 数据分析与技术文档整理。
actions.en:
- Built Android status and control workflows with Java.
- Developed a .NET/C# desktop client for acquisition, storage, analysis, and control.
- Contributed to LoRa connectivity, Python analysis, and technical documentation.

results.zh: 完成移动端、上位机与通信文档交付，并以第一作者发表两篇相关论文。
results.en: Delivered mobile, desktop, and communication documentation and published two related papers as first author.

title.zh: 冬奥会电梯测试软件

summary.zh: 连接信号仪、功率计与场强计的辐射参数测试和报表软件。
summary.en: Radiation parameter testing and reporting software integrating signal, power, and field-strength instruments.

background.zh: 测试流程需要统一连接信号仪、功率计和场强计，完成辐射参数设置、校准、采集、动态展示与报表导出。
background.en: The test workflow needed unified integration of signal, power, and field-strength instruments for configuration, calibration, acquisition, live display, and report export.

actions.zh:
- 使用 C# / .NET 开发仪器通信、参数设置、校准测试与数据采集。
- 实现单项与汇总数据动态展示、报表导出和机械装置远程控制。
- 负责界面、后端代码、项目测试和交付文档。
actions.en:
- Built instrument communication, parameter setup, calibration, and acquisition in C#/.NET.
- Implemented live single/aggregate views, report export, and remote mechanical control.
- Owned UI, backend code, testing, and delivery documentation.

results.zh: 三人项目小组完成测试软件开发并顺利交付。
results.en: Delivered the completed test application as part of a three-person team.

title.zh: 智慧仓储

summary.zh: 基于 ARM、Linux 与 C 的校内实训项目。
summary.en: An ARM, Linux, and C training project for smart warehouse management.

background.zh: 校内实训要求在 ARM 开发板上完成智慧仓储管理，覆盖从 Linux 系统到 Web 管理功能的完整链路。
background.en: The training project required smart warehouse management on an ARM board, spanning the Linux system and web-facing management functions.

actions.zh:
- 使用 C 与 Linux 开发 ARM 设备功能。
- 参与系统移植、Linux 内核编译与移植、驱动开发。
- 完成 BOA 与 CGI 的移植、配置和功能编码。
actions.en:
- Built ARM device functionality with C and Linux.
- Worked on system porting, Linux kernel builds and porting, and driver development.
- Ported and configured BOA and CGI and implemented related functions.

results.zh: 完成智慧仓储实训项目并获得 95 分。
results.en: Completed the smart warehouse training project with a score of 95.

degree.en: B.Eng. in Internet of Things Engineering

details.zh: 国家励志奖学金、三好学生、三好学生标兵、优秀毕业设计。
details.en: National Encouragement Scholarship, Outstanding Student honors, and Excellent Graduation Project.

title.zh: 第一作者：《基于 LoRa 物联网的智慧牧场系统》
title.en: First-author paper: LoRa-based IoT Smart Ranch System

title.zh: 第十一届蓝桥杯电子类省级三等奖
第一作者：《基于 LoRa 网络的 Android 智慧养殖场系统》
title.en: First-author paper: Android Smart Farm System over LoRa

title.zh: CET-4 · 普通话二级甲等 · 驾驶证 C1
title.en: CET-4 · Mandarin Level 2-A · Driver License C1
